rules.G1: every OVERLAY_FILE_MAP source has valid grammar (path + .cc/.hh/.py/.isa)
rules.G2: every OVERLAY_FILE_MAP source exists on disk under overlays/
rules.G3: every policy token has both <pol>_rp.cc + .hh in OVERLAY_FILE_MAP
rules.G4: every prefetcher token has both <pf>.cc + .hh in OVERLAY_FILE_MAP
rules.G5: every PATCH_FILES entry exists on disk under overlays/
rules.G6: OVERLAY_FILE_MAP+PATCH_FILES is exhaustive over overlays/ (modulo OVERLAY_EXTRA_ALLOW)
rules.G7: live setup_gem5.OVERLAY_FILE_MAP+PATCH_FILES matches canonical registry (parity + identity invariant)
